cli.description: Distributed agent orchestration, without a control plane.
cli.run_description: Start Lattix: auto-initialize if needed, then watch for tasks
cli.run_option_daemon: Run as a background daemon process
cli.submit_description: Submit a new task for all machines to execute
cli.submit_option_prompt: The prompt/instruction for the coding agent
cli.submit_option_title: A short title for the task
cli.submit_option_agent: Agent command template. Use {prompt} as placeholder (e.g. "claude -p {prompt} --allowed-tools WebSearch")
cli.status_description: Show status of all tasks or a specific task
cli.install_description: Install Lattix auto-start on login (scheduled task)
cli.uninstall_description: Remove Lattix auto-start and stop running instance
run.scheduled_task_running: Lattix is running (PID {pid}) with auto-start on login.
run.scheduled_task_hint: Use `lattix stop` to stop or `lattix uninstall` to remove auto-start.
run.scheduled_task_starting: Lattix auto-start is configured. Starting via scheduled task...
run.submit_hint: To submit a task: {command} submit --prompt "your instruction here"
submit.title: Title: {title}
submit.sync_hint: This task will be synced to all machines via OneDrive.
status.auto_start_not_running: Lattix auto-start is configured but not currently running
status.auto_start_hint: Run `lattix run` to start, or it will auto-start on next login.
stop.not_running_no_pid: Lattix is not running (no PID file found)
stop.not_running_stale: Lattix is not running (stale PID file cleaned up)
install.already_installed_running: Lattix scheduled task is already installed and running.
install.already_running: Lattix is already running (PID {pid}). Stop it first with `lattix stop`.
install.auto_start_hint: Lattix will auto-start on login via `npx lattix run -d`
install.already_installed: Lattix scheduled task is already installed.
install.submit_hint: To submit a task: {command} submit --prompt "your instruction here"
uninstall.not_installed: No Lattix scheduled task is installed.
uninstall.no_auto_start: Lattix will no longer auto-start on login.
bootstrap.no_onedrive:
No supported OneDrive account found.
Please install OneDrive and sign in with either your personal or business account.
Download: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/onedrive/download
setup.symlink_exists_as_dir: {path} exists as a regular directory, not a symlink. Skipping.
setup.symlink_failed:
Failed to create symlink or junction at {path}.
On Windows, try enabling Developer Mode:
  Settings → Update & Security → For developers → Developer Mode
Error: {error}
setup.config_missing_path: Config file missing OneDrive path, recreating
watcher.load_processed_error: Could not load processed.json, starting fresh
executor.timeout: Task {taskId} timed out after {minutes} minutes, killing process
shortcut.available: `lattix` command is now available (shortcut to `npx -y lattix`)
detector.multiple_accounts: Multiple OneDrive accounts detected. Using the first one:
